title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXVII. Games.
content:
Clap hands, clap hands,
            Hie Tommy Randy,
        Did you see my good man?
            They call him Cock-a-bandy.

        Silken Stockings on his legs,
            Silver buckles glancin',
        A sky-blue bonnet on his head,
            And oh, but he is handsome.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXVII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
